summary: G-001 v1.1 task routing turn. Processed Jared's Q1-Q5 brainstorm decisions. Routed ops tasks (OPS-G001-001 through 006) to alice-ops via inbox-ops.md. Routed review tasks (REV-G001-001 through 004) to alice-review via inbox-review.md. Posted MSG-009 and MSG-010 to mail.md. Marked BLT-011 acknowledged, posted BLT-012 to bulletin.md. Created spaces/generator/outbox.md. Updated brain.json with session note.
decisions: Q1: repo write = draft/staging only, human review gate required
Q2: outbox + bulletin, bulletin for important events only
Q4: README split — install vs review, file #8 in ZIP
Q5: validate.js local first, no hosted validator yet
